message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "simpy" {
    component container as C1 {
        capacity: Union[int, float]
        init: Union[int, float]
    }
    component environment as C2
}

component Component as E1 <<enumeration>> {
    C1
    C2
    C3
}

component Buffer as C3 {
    id: int
    accepts: Component
    will_accept(): bool
}

component Inspector as C4 {
    id: int
    env: environment
    buffers: List[Buffer]
    components: List[Component]
    
    get_random_component(): Component
    get_inspection_time(): int
    inspect_component: Generator
    add_component_to_buffer(): Generator
    main_loop(): None
}

component Workstation as C5 {
    id: int
    env: environment
    buffers: List[Buffer]
    
    get_assembly_time(): int
    get_components(): Generator
    assemble(): Generator
    main_loop(): None
}

C1 --|> C3
E1 -- C3
E1 -- C4
E1 -- C5
C2 -- C4
C2 -- C5

@enduml
```
